goal: Register agent-role-builder as a governed tool in bootstrap mode. Role creation is deferred.
business_context: agent-role-builder is the first tool in the ADF bootstrap sequence. It must be registered before it can create its own role (chicken-and-egg). This registration uses bootstrap mode (skip_build_agent_role=true) as a documented exception.
notes: Bootstrap mode: role creation deferred. Will be attached in subsequent step.
